title: Paesi Paesi Lyrics Vaa Deal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Vaa Deal Paesi Paesi Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Haricharan
Music: Thaman S

Ippodhu enakku ennaachu
unmela kadhal undaachu
unnodu vazha aasa vandhaaachu

Paesi paesi
unna paesi udhadum theiyudhe.
kadhal thooral poda solli
ullam kaettkudhey.

Yaanamela oora paarkkum
oru chinna pillayaa
Yaengi vaadum enna paartha
adhu paavam illayaa.

Oru vaartha solladi
en vazhka maaridum.
manam kallaa manam kallaa
adha nallaa paaradi.

Ippodhu enakku ennaachu
unmela kadhal undaachu
unnodu vazha aasa vandhaachu.

Paesi paesi
unna paesi udhadum theiyudhe.
kadhal thooral poda solli
ullam kaettkudhey.

Saami kanna kuththaadhe
kadalum vaththi pogaadhey
ullukulla enna ennam
solli poyaendi.

Koocham yaedhum illaama
kenji kaettendi.
ye paavi oosi yaethum kanna
kaatti yaendi enna konna.

Ippodhu enakku ennaachu
unmela kadhal undaachu
unnodu vazha aasa vandhaachu.

minji minji ponaalum
nenju innum moonae naal
thaangidaadhu pola iruku
seidhi solladi.

enna yaedhum theriyaama
naanum ninnaeney
adi paavi mounam thaanaa
konnaa.
paaraan kalla pola ninna
manam kallaa manam kallaa
adha nallaa paaradi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Paesi Paesi'?

The song 'Paesi Paesi' expresses the feelings of love and affection, highlighting the emotions that come with being in love.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Vaa Deal'?

In Vaa Deal, this song plays during a romantic moment, showcasing the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who is the singer of 'Paesi Paesi'?

The song is sung by the talented Haricharan, known for his expressive vocal style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Paesi Paesi' is composed by Thaman S, who is known for his catchy and melodious tunes.

When was 'Paesi Paesi' released?

'Paesi Paesi' was released on April 26, 2015, as part of the movie Vaa Deal.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Paesi Paesi', the protagonist expresses his deep feelings of love and longing, making it a quintessential romantic ballad. The song captures the essence of affection, as the lyrics convey a heartfelt message about the joys and complexities of love. Set against the backdrop of the movie Vaa Deal, it enhances the emotional connection between the characters. With Haricharan's captivating vocals, the song evokes a sense of happiness and nostalgia, making it perfect for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paesi Paesi from Vaa Deal is a delightful romantic track that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Haricharan's soulful voice, the song resonates with anyone who has ever experienced the magic of affection. This enchanting melody is sure to elevate your mood and make your heart flutter.
stanzaMeanings: Right now, what has happened to me? There is love for you, and my desire to live with you has come.
Right now, what has happened to me? There is love for you.
Talk to me, talk to me, your words are like a blessing. Love is like a rain shower, and my heart is listening.
A little child looking at the world, why does it seem like a sin to look at me?
Just say one word, and my life will change. Don't let your heart be blind; look at it well.
Right now, what has happened to me? There is love for you, and my desire to live with you has come.
Right now, what has happened to me? There is love for you.
Talk to me, talk to me, your words are like a blessing. Love is like a rain shower, and my heart is listening.
Oh God, don't dance; don't let the waves go away. Inside, what do I say to my heart?
Without any hesitation, I asked. Oh sinner, why do you show your eyes to me?
Right now, what has happened to me? There is love for you, and my desire to live with you has come.
Even if it fades away, my heart still can't bear to wait for three days; please tell me.
Without knowing anything, I too am thinking of you. Oh sinner, is silence the answer? Just like a stone, your heart is blind; look at it well.
